news.t: Grayscale Launches Grayscale® Bitcoin Adopters ETF (Ticker: BCOR)
Barrington reveals 10 best stock ideas for 2023

holdings.infoBox: BCOR is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tesla stock at 19.48%, Strategy at 17.16%, Galaxy Digital at 6.31%, Hut 8 at 5.12%, and Block at 4.94%.

overview.description: The Grayscale Bitcoin Adopters ETF (BCOR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx Bitcoin Adopters index. The fund tracks an index that primarily consists of global companies with at least 100 bitcoin in their corporate treasury. Securities are weighted based on the function of their bitcoin exposure BCOR was launched on Apr 30, 2025 and is issued by Grayscale.

data.text: Newest ETF from Grayscale Invests in Firms That Have Adopted Bitcoin as a Treasury Reserve Asset Newest ETF from Grayscale Invests in Firms That Have Adopted Bitcoin as a Treasury Reserve Asset
